summary: Comprehensive testing of Service Contract Management System with Multi-Step Certification Application Form Wizard. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified admin/client dashboards, form wizard navigation, language switching (Arabic RTL/English LTR), and form assignment functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: ApplicationForm.js is well-structured with 6 steps and proper state management
RTL/LTR layout switching works correctly with proper CSS handling
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Backend API endpoints follow RESTful conventions with proper authentication
Form validation requires declaration agreement before submission (good security practice)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_Draft Company and TEST_Submitted Company application forms for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Admin login/dashboard - PASS, 2) Admin 'Assign New Form' modal with client dropdown - PASS, 3) Client login/dashboard - PASS, 4) Client sees assigned forms with 'Start Form'/'Continue Form' buttons - PASS, 5) 6-step form wizard navigation (Next/Previous) - PASS, 6) Step 1 Company Information fields - PASS, 7) Step 2 Certification Selection checkboxes - PASS, 8) Save Draft functionality - PASS, 9) RTL layout for Arabic - PASS, 10) LTR layout for English - PASS, 11) Language switching - PASS. Backend API tests cover: authentication, application form CRUD, form assignment, draft saving, form submission with validation.
